Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPIMM2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; VIMM^PXPXRM 4250 ; SRCHIMM(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N ERR,DVPIMM,CNT,DFN,IMMUNID,ICN,PXFILTER,QRY,QRYRSLT,IX,RSLTARY,PAGING,BUFFER,SMRY S (IX,ERR,DFN,ICN)="",(SMRY,CNT)=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ;clean out unused params D CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ; S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHIMM^DVPIMM2")=0 G QUIT ;Get the immunizations list S FILTER("domain")="IMMUNIZATIONS",FILTER("patientId")=DFN D GET^VPRDJ(.RES,.FILTER) N I,Y,JSON,CNT S I="",CNT=0 F S I=$O(@RES@(I)) Q:I="" D . I $G(@RES@(I))'="" S CNT=CNT+1,JSON(CNT)=$G(@RES@(I)) . I $D(@RES@(I))>=10 S Y="" F S Y=$O(@RES@(I,Y)) Q:Y="" D . . I $G(@RES@(I,Y))'="" S CNT=CNT+1,JSON(CNT)=$G(@RES@(I,Y)) D DECODE^VPRJSON("JSON","QRY") F S IX=$O(QRY("data","items",IX)) Q:IX="" D . S QRYRSLT(IX)=QRY("data","items",IX,"uid"),QRYRSLT=IX ; ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; D SRCHIMM2(DFN,.QRYRSLT) ;Build the response using paging if needed K RSLTARY S CNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(QRYRSLT(IX)) Q:IX="" D . S CNT=CNT+1,RSLTARY(CNT)=QRYRSLT(IX),RSLTARY=CNT N PAGING D:+$G(RSLTARY)>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(RSLTARY,.PAGING) . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D FHIRIMM^DVPIMM1(ICN,$P(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),":",6),.BUFFER,SMRY) . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",RSLTCNT)=BUFFER D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS ; QUIT ; Q ; SRCHIMM2(DFN,QRYRSLT) ;PERFORM THE QUERY N IX,BUFFER S IX="" F S IX=$O(QRYRSLT(IX)) Q:IX="" D . ;get the record . D VIMM^PXPXRM($P(QRYRSLT(IX),":",6),.BUFFER) . I $$REMOVE(.BUFFER,$P(QRYRSLT(IX),":",6))=1 K QRYRSLT(IX) Q ; REMOVE(DVPIMM,DA) ; returns 1 if record has to be removed, 0 if it has to stay N RMV S RMV=0 ;Date S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("date"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I $$DTCMPR^DVPUTLS($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U),DVPIMM("EVENT DATE TIME"),$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3))<1 S RMV=1 ; ;Location S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("location"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("location")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I $P(DVPIMM("LOCATION"),U)'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("location")),U) S RMV=1 ; ;Identifier S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("identifier"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I DA'=$P($P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U),":",6) S RMV=1 ; ;Manufacturer S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("manufacturer"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("manufacturer")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I $P(DVPIMM("MANUFACTURER"),U)'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("manufacturer")),U) S RMV=1 ; ;Practitioner S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("practitioner"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("practitioner")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I $P(DVPIMM("ENCOUNTER PROVIDER"),U)'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("practitioner")),U) S RMV=1 ; ;Reaction S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("reaction"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("reaction")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I DVPIMM("REACTION")'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("reaction")),U) S RMV=1 ; ;Status N QUIT S RMV=0,QUIT=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("status"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("status")),U,2)="not" QUIT='QUIT Q:QUIT 1 . N STATUS,PXLIST S PXLIST(DA)="",PXFILTER("START")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-60000) . D RPC^PXVRPC7(.STATUS,.PXFILTER,,,0) . D DECODE^VPRJSON("@STATUS", "QRY") . N IX,DELFND S IX="",DELFND=0 . F S IX=$O(QRY("ITEMS",IX)) Q:IX="" D . . I $G(QRY("ITEMS",IX,"IMM-DELETE","ID"))=DA S DELFND=1 Q . S STATUS=$S(DELFND=1:"entered-in-error",1:"completed") . I STATUS'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("status")),U) S QUIT=1 ; ;Vaccine code S RMV=0 I $G(QUERYPAR("vaccinecode"))'="" D S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("vaccinecode")),U,2)="not" RMV='RMV Q:RMV 1 . I DVPIMM("CVX")'=$P($G(QUERYPAR("vaccinecode")),U) S RMV=1 ; Q 0
